arts.ttl: Uli Hoeneß insists on not interfering with Bayern Munich co-workers Eberl and Freund
arts.sum: What if the duo were unable to step back fully and would continually interfere with the work of the newer employees? Uli Hoeness, however, claims he is not interfering with the work of board member for sport Max Eberl and sporting director Christoph Freund’s work...much: “Only when the opportunity arises.

arts.sum: Xabi Alonso could be ready to spring a surprise starting line-up when his Bayer Leverkusen side play Bayern Munich in the DFB Pokal at the Allianz Arena on Tuesday. Die…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich predicted XI v Bayer Leverkusen: Changes aplenty for Vincent Kompany’s side
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be without Harry Kane for the first time this season when Vincent Kompany’s side host Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen in the DFB Pokal Round of 16 on…

arts.ttl: Tactics Corner: Nuri Şahin and Vincent Kompany show tactical nous in Der Klassiker
arts.sum: The first half was defined by the structured and consistently effective pressing from his Dortmund side, as they seized on every small lapse in Bayern's play to win the ball and start counter-attacks. The Dortmund defence proved to be just as determined and front-footed - with centre-back Waldemar Anton leading the way by winning possession after just 38 seconds when he followed Jamal Musiala high up the field.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Over the weekend, Bayern Munich ’s seven game streak of clean sheets wins came to an end in the wild Der Klassiker 1-1 draw. Bayern is undefeated in its last eight matches and Leverkusen is working on a four game streak as well.

arts.ttl: Who will replace Harry Kane at Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Bayern Munich believe they have a plethora of options when it comes to replacing Harry Kane over the next few weeks. As previously reported, the England…

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso knows DFB-Pokal match vs. Bayern Munich will be special
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso can look back to his squad’s 1-1 draw with Bayern Munich on September 28th to see an effective way to keep the potent Bavarian attack at bay. Playing in Munich is probably the biggest challenge you can have in the DFB-Pokal and is a top game for everyone.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso on Bayer Leverkusen’s DFB Pokal tie against Bayern Munich: “The match is like a final.”

arts.sum: The injury crisis at Bayer Leverkusen could open the door for a young, up-and-coming talent from the academy to make the jump to the first team. Kerim Alajbegovic has impressed playing for the...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany ready for second chance at Bayer Leverkusen this season in DFB-Pokal showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany remembers his team’s 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen well. The manager is hoping for a different result (and a chance to advance in the DFB-Pokal), but is also unsure on how Bayer Leverkusen will approach the match.
